---
title: "Shey Dorji"
image: "files/img/profile4.jpeg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:sdorji@bren.ucsb.edu
    - icon: linkedin 
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shey-dorji-b21437212/
    - icon: github
      href: https://www.github.com/swdorji
---
marine biochemistry | environmental economics
